name: RPlog_talk_Cochran_Invaded
title: Talk Page: Template Parse Error Fixed
summary: This is an out-of-character wiki talk page for the Cochran Invaded log. Danik Kreldin reports being unable to figure out what is wrong with the template, and the editor Hawke replies that a missing bracket after Cochran caused a parse error, which has been fixed. There is no in-character roleplay content.
